/usr/bin/c++  -I/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.4.sdk/usr/include/c++/v1 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_point_analyzer.dir/tests/test_point_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_point_analyzer.dir/src/point_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_point_analyzer.dir/src/report_generator.cpp.o -o bin/test_point_analyzer  /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
